title: National Curling Federation — Operational Portal
one_liner: A dense, utilitarian institutional portal for a national curling federation, with icy-blue and granite palette, scoreboard ticker, league standings, athlete rosters, tournament brackets, club locator map, rules handbook, and a filterable results archive.
tagline: Est. 1903 · Hammer · Sweep · Sport for All

typography.sans: Helvetica Neue / Arial — workhorse grotesk, tight leading, small-caps metadata labels
typography.mono: SF Mono / Menlo — tabular numerals in standings, bracket scores, and end-by-end grids

motifs: Concentric target-house rings used as bullet markers and footer accents
Granite-stone cross-section illustration on rules and home pages
Broom-stroke / hairline rules separating dense table rows
Topographic ice-rink line motif behind the club-of-the-week spotlight
Live results ticker scrolling along the top of every page

sections: Masthead with federation crest, primary nav, scrolling results ticker
Three-column dashboard: national rankings (men/women/mixed-doubles tabs), playoff bracket teaser with live final, news + officiating notice column
Club of the Week spotlight with stat block and topographic motif
Sponsor strip and full institutional footer
Filter chip rail (season, discipline, region, view)
Division tabs (Premier / Challenger / Regional Conference)
Dense data table with sortable columns, inline sparklines, alternating shading
Legend / scoring glossary sidebar
CSV and printable PDF export actions
Featured National Squad module
Left rail filters (discipline, position, region, hand, age category, documents)
Grid of athlete cards with silhouette portraits, position chip, caps, hammer% and medals
Pagination control with 412 athletes / 23 pages
Tournament header (dates, venue, draw status, sheets)
Live scoring banner for current final
Toggle between round-robin pools and playoff bracket
Four-round playoff bracket with end-by-end score grids, hammer indicators, officials
Draw schedule sheet-assignment table
Assigned officials panel
Filter chip rail (league, program, accessibility, sheets)
Two-pane locator: SVG national map (left ~60%) with 15 club markers shaded by sheet count, scrollable result list (right)
Click-through flyouts with sheet count, members, programs, accessibility
Submit-a-club link
Sticky chapter table of contents with numbered chapters and sections
Documentation-style two-pane handbook (Edition 21)
Inline SVG diagrams: ice sheet, granite stone cross-section, free-guard-zone
Rule-change callouts, footnote citations to WCF references
Five-step officiating certification ladder
Subscribe-to-notices form and full handbook PDF download
Filter chip rail (event, gender, region, medal toggles)
Season range slider 1976 → 2026
Grouped results tables with medal indicators and expandable end-by-end detail rows
Historical champions horizontal carousel
Right-side year facet sidebar
CSV / PDF export actions
Category chip rail
Lead news hero (selection press release)
Two-column bulletin list (10 dated bulletins, paginated)
Officiating Notices sidebar with subscribe form
Athlete of the Month card with stat block
Partner sponsor strip

interactions_implemented: Tab switching on rankings (men/women/mixed doubles) and standings divisions
Filter chips toggle active/inactive; exclusive chip groups behave like radios
Club map markers and list rows are interlinked — click either to open the flyout and highlight the row
Expandable results rows reveal end-by-end scoring grids
Subscribe forms confirm inline without leaving the page
Live results ticker auto-scrolls across the page top

assets_strategy.logo: Concentric-ring crest rendered as inline SVG (target-house motif)
assets_strategy.athlete_portraits: Silhouette SVGs used as placeholders per spec
assets_strategy.map: Stylised inline SVG country outline with five labelled regional polygons and 15 club marker dots sized by sheet count
assets_strategy.diagrams: Inline SVG for ice sheet, granite stone cross-section, free-guard-zone
assets_strategy.sponsors: Monospaced text placeholders styled as outlined logo plates

tech.stack: Vanilla HTML, shared CSS, small vanilla JS
